business_definition: Represents a canonical insurance protection that defines standardized protection against specific insured risks.
remarks: Root aggregate of the Coverage domain.

business_definition: Represents one or more business benefits delivered by a canonical coverage.
Represents financial limits governing protection provided by a coverage.
Represents business conditions that must be satisfied before a coverage becomes applicable.
Represents business rules determining whether a coverage may be applied.
Represents situations under which a coverage does not provide protection.
Represents the financial responsibility retained by the insured before coverage applies.

entity_type: governance and operational management of canonical coverages.
recommendation intelligence and explainability for canonical coverages.
